text:

Author: markj

Log:
  acpi_ibm(4): Rename disengaged mode to unthrottled mode.

  This mode was added in r362496.  Rename it to make the meaning more
  clear.

  PR:		247306
  Suggested by:	rpokala
  Submitted by:	Ali Abdallah <ali.abdallah@suse.com>
  MFC with:	r362496
